/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.4.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/two048.dir/tests/two048.c.o -o two048   -L/Users/mohammedakramlrhorfi/Downloads/projet_c_ig_3.2.2/_macos  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/mohammedakramlrhorfi/Downloads/projet_c_ig_3.2.2/_macos libei.a -leibase -L/opt/local/lib -lfreeimage -lSDL2 -lSDL2_ttf
